rule.instruction: Ten thousand lines about 10 inches (25 cm) long, covering the wall evenly.

designs.title: flow field, crisp
designs.intent: even coverage oriented by a smooth flow — the strokes follow an invisible current (Klee #13 loose articulation).

designs.title: flow field, hand-drawn
designs.intent: the flow field with a living hand — grass/hair in wind (Klee #3, #13).

designs.title: very dense flow
designs.intent: very dense flow — a thick organic current (Klee #5, #13).

designs.title: broad flow, long
designs.intent: longer strokes, gentler flow — sweeping currents (Klee #13).

designs.title: tight swirls
designs.intent: high flow scale -> tight swirling vortices (Klee #13, complex).

designs.title: random scatter, hand
designs.intent: no current — pure even random scatter, hand-drawn (Klee #11).

designs.title: dense random thicket
designs.intent: dense random short strokes — a chaotic thicket (Klee #5, #11).

designs.title: sparse long random
designs.intent: fewer, longer random strokes — airier scatter (Klee #7).

designs.title: dense wild flow
designs.intent: dense flow with the most energetic hand (R10) (Klee #3, #5).

designs.title: aligned vertical-ish
designs.intent: strokes roughly aligned vertical — a combed field (control) (Klee #4).

designs.title: aligned diagonal
designs.intent: strokes aligned on a diagonal — combed at 30° (control) (Klee #4).

designs.title: densest flow
designs.intent: the densest flow field — near-solid woven current (Klee #5).

designs.title: dense wild random
designs.intent: dense random strokes, wild hand — maximal chaos (Klee #3, #11).
